items.title: Higher Word Orchestra Autumn Concert
items.location: Basilica of St. Patrick's Old Cathedral, New York City
items.body: An evening of sacred and classical repertoire with the Higher Word Orchestra, interspersed with reflections on the composers' lives.

items.title: Glorious Mystery now streaming
items.body: Six Marian chants recorded live at Holy Cross Church in Rumson, NJ, with Christa on harp, alongside soprano Dr. Carly York.

items.title: Featured by The Good Newsroom
items.body: The Archdiocese of New York's Good Newsroom visited Holy Innocents Parish to talk with Christa about living out her faith through sacred music.
